name: Light Cruiser, Sirius
ability: 【CONT】 During your turn, if all of your characters are yellow or blue, this card gets +1500 power.

If you do, search your deck for up to 1 level 1 or lower character, reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.

name: Heavy Cruiser, Cheshire
ability: 【CONT】 Experience During your turn, if the total level of the cards in your level is 2 or higher, this card gets +6000 power.

name: Light Cruiser, Belfast
ability: 【CONT】 If your waiting room has 2 or less climax, this card gets -1 level while in your hand.
【AUTO】 [Put 1 card from your hand into your waiting room] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may pay the cost. If you do, put the top card of your clock into your stock.

【CONT】 Experience During your turn, if the total level of the cards in your level is 6 or higher, this card gets +3500 power and the following ability. "【AUTO】 When this card's battle opponent becomes 【REVERSE】, you may put that character on the top of your opponent's deck."

name: Light Aircraft Carrier, Unicorn
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, look at up to 3 cards from the top of your deck, choose up to 1 card from among them, put it into your hand, and put the rest into your waiting room.

【AUTO】 【CXCOMBO】 When this card attacks, if "Don't Miss the Mission Bonus, Okay?" is in your climax area, and you have another 《KAN-SEN》 character, perform the following action up to X times. "Put the top card of your deck into your waiting room. If that card has in its trigger icon, deal 1 damage to your opponent." X is equal to 3 if this card is in the middle position of your center stage, otherwise it is equal to 2. (Damage may be canceled)

name: Chen Hai
ability: 【AUTO】 [(1) Put 1 card from your hand into your waiting room] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand or put into your waiting room from the stage, you may pay the cost. If you do, choose 1 character in your waiting room, and return it to your hand.
【AUTO】 When this card attacks, choose 1 character in your opponent's center stage, and that character gets -1000 power until end of turn.
flavor_text: If you're not busy, then... come here, let's play a match of Go?

name: Joffre
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may reveal up to 3 cards from the top of your deck. If you revealed 1 or more cards, choose up to 1 yellow character from among them, put it into your hand, put the rest into your waiting room, choose 1 card in your hand, and put it into your waiting room.
flavor_text: Done with your morning prayers already?

name: Plymouth
ability: 【CONT】 You cannot play events or "Backup" from your hand.
【AUTO】 At the beginning of your opponent's attack phase, you may move this card to the open middle position of your center stage.
flavor_text: Rejoice, dear Commander, for this morning is most refreshing.

name: Scylla
ability: 【AUTO】 Experience When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, if the total level of the cards in your level is 2 or higher, this card gets +4500 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.
【AUTO】 When this card's trigger check reveals a card with in its trigger icon, choose 1 of your characters, and that character gets +1 soul until end of turn.
flavor_text: Heehee, as you can see, I am nothing more than an ordinary maid.

name: Janus
ability: 【CONT】 During your turn, if you have another 《KAN-SEN》 character, this card gets +3000 power.

【AUTO】 【CXCOMBO】 When this card's battle opponent becomes 【REVERSE】, if "Anniversary Shot With Everyone" is in your climax area, choose 1 《KAN-SEN》 character in your waiting room, return it to your hand, and this card gets "【AUTO】 Encore [Put 1 character from your hand into your waiting room]" until the end of your opponent's next turn.
flavor_text: I hope the seas will remain calm today…

name: Brest
ability: 【CONT】 During your opponent's turn, if you have another 《KAN-SEN》 character, this card gets +10500 power.
【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, this card gets +10500 power until end of turn.
flavor_text: O Champion, what tales of heroism will you weave into the annals of history today?

name: Manchester
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card attacks, if the character facing this card is level 3 or higher, this card gets +6000 power and +2 soul until end of turn.
flavor_text: Hey up, Master! Just got done tidying up the office.

name: Implacable
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, if your opponent's hand has 4 or more cards, choose 1 random card in your opponent's hand, reveal it, put it into their memory, and your opponent returns that card to their hand at the end of their next turn.
【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may put the top card of your clock into your waiting room.
flavor_text: May blessings find their way to you, Commander.

name: Surcouf
ability: 【AUTO】 When a climax with in its trigger icon is placed on your climax area, choose 1 of your 《KAN-SEN》 characters, and that character gets +1 soul until end of turn.

【ACT】 Brainstorm [(1) 【REST】 this card] Flip over 4 cards from the top of your deck, and put them into your waiting room. For each climax revealed among those cards, perform the following action. "Look at up to 3 cards from the top of your deck, choose up to 1 card from among them, put it into your hand, and put the rest into your waiting room."

name: Royal Oak
ability: 【AUTO】 [Put 1 《KAN-SEN》 character from your hand into your waiting room] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may pay the cost. 【AUTO】 When this card becomes 【REVERSE】, if this card's battle opponent is level 0 or lower, you may put that character into your opponent's stock. If you do, put the bottom card of your opponent's stock into their waiting room.

name: Valiant
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, put up to 2 cards from the top of your deck into your waiting room.

【AUTO】 [Put 1 level 1 or higher card from your hand into your waiting room] During your main phase, when this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may pay the cost. If you do, choose 1 《KAN-SEN》 character with level equal to or lower than your level in your waiting room, and during that main phase, you may play that card from your waiting room without fulfilling color requirements. (If cost is needed to play the card, pay the cost. Climax are regarded as level 0)

name: Albion
ability: 【CONT】 You cannot play events or "Backup" from your hand.

【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, choose 1 of your opponent's characters, and that character gets the following ability until end of turn. "【CONT】 This card cannot be returned to hand or put into memory."

name: Abercrombie
ability: 【CONT】 All of your other climax with in the trigger icon in all of your zones get in the trigger icon.

name: Flandre
ability: 【CONT】 During your turn, this card gets +4000 power.

"Choose up to 2 level 1 or higher characters in your waiting room, and return them to your hand."

name: Unzen
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may put the top card of your clock into your waiting room.

ability: 【AUTO】 [(1) Put the top card of your deck into your clock] When this card is put into your waiting room from the stage, you may pay the cost. ability: 【AUTO】 【CXCOMBO】 When "Sisters' Joint Battle" is placed on your climax area, if you have 4 or more other 《KAN-SEN》 characters, reveal the top 2 cards of your deck, your opponent chooses 1 event or character from among them, puts it into your hand, and puts the rest into your waiting room.

If you do, search your deck for up to 1 "Light Cruiser, Noshiro", reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck."

【AUTO】 When this card attacks, if the character facing this card is level 2, this card gets +6000 power until end of turn.

ability: 【CONT】 All of your other 《KAN-SEN》 characters get +500 power.
【ACT】 [【REST】 this card] Choose 1 of your 《KAN-SEN》 characters, and that character gets +1500 power until end of turn.

name: Ryuujou
ability: 【AUTO】 At the beginning of your opponent's attack phase, choose 1 of your 《KAN-SEN》 characters, and that character gets +500 power until end of turn.

【ACT】 Brainstorm [(1) 【REST】 this card] Flip over 4 cards from the top of your deck, and put them into your waiting room. For each climax revealed among those cards, search your deck for up to 1 《KAN-SEN》 character, reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.

name: Miyuki
ability: 【AUTO】 [(1) Put 1 card from your hand into your waiting room] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may pay the cost. If you do, search your deck for up to 1 《KAN-SEN》 character, reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.

name: I-26

If you do, look at up to 4 cards from the top of your deck, choose up to 1 green character from among them, reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, put the rest into your waiting room, and this card gets +1000 power until end of turn.

flavor_text: There you are, Commander! Ehehe~ Huh? You've never heard of me?

name: Alabama
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, put the top 2 cards of your deck into your waiting room, and this card gets +X power until end of turn. X is equal to the number of 《KAN-SEN》 characters among those cards ×1000.

【AUTO】 [(1) Put 1 《KAN-SEN》 character from your waiting room at the bottom of your clock] When this card is put into your waiting room from the stage, you may pay the cost. If you do, choose 1 《KAN-SEN》 character in your waiting room, and return it to your hand.
flavor_text: I'm Alabama. You need somethin'?

name: Morrison
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, this card gets +1500 power until end of turn.
【AUTO】 When this card's battle opponent becomes 【REVERSE】, choose 1 of your 《KAN-SEN》 characters, and that character gets +2000 power until end of turn.
flavor_text: Ah, um, are you the commander?

name: Astoria
ability: 【CONT】 During your turn, this card gets +1000 power.
【AUTO】 When this card's battle opponent becomes 【REVERSE】, choose 1 of your other 《KAN-SEN》 characters, 【REST】 it, and move it to an open position of your back stage.
flavor_text: Commander, you can totally rely on me more!

name: Nautilus
ability: 【AUTO】 [Put this card into your waiting room] When your other 《KAN-SEN》 character is frontal attacked, you may pay the cost. If you do, choose 1 of your characters in battle, and that character gets +1000 power until end of turn.

【ACT】 [Put 1 card from your hand into your waiting room & Put this card at the bottom of your deck] Search your deck for up to 1 《KAN-SEN》 character, reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavor_text: I wish I could dive deeper and get to know the secrets of the sea…

name: Dewey
ability: 【CONT】 If you have another "Gridley" in your center stage, this card gets +1000 power and the following ability. "【CONT】 All of your other "Gridley" get +1500 power and "【AUTO】 Encore [Put 1 《KAN-SEN》 character from your waiting room at the bottom of your clock]".
【AUTO】 When this card attacks, choose up to 2 of your 《KAN-SEN》 characters, and those characters get +1500 power until end of turn.
flavor_text: Is there something on your mind, Commander?

name: Biloxi
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card attacks, if there is a climax is in your climax area, reveal the top card of your deck. If that card is level 1 or higher, put it into your stock. (Otherwise, return it to its original place. Climax are regarded as level 0)
【AUTO】 When this card attacks, if there is no climax in your climax area, and you have another 《KAN-SEN》 character, this card gets +3000 power until end of turn.
flavor_text: I hope we can work together and seize victory as fellow fleet members.

name: Louisville
ability: 【CONT】 This card gets +1500 power for each of your other 《KAN-SEN》 characters.
【AUTO】 During this card's battle, when the damage you received is not canceled, this card gets +3000 power until end of turn.
flavor_text: Today's schedule is... observing the port, confirming the drill plans, sitting in on a friendly meeting... Hm? Which one was the first thing in the morning, again...?

name: Chkalov
ability: 【ACT】 [Put this card into your waiting room] Choose 1 of your opponent's characters, and return it to their hand.

【ACT】 Experience [【REST】 this card] If the total level of the cards in your level is 5 or higher, choose 1 of your characters, and that character gets +1000 power and the following ability until end of turn. "【AUTO】 When this card's battle opponent becomes 【REVERSE】, you may put that character at the bottom of your opponent's deck."
flavor_text: Oh, so you're a real workhorse. Suppose I'll really have to apply myself as your secretary then.

name: Northern Parliament
ability: You may choose 1 card in your level and 1 card in your waiting room, and exchange them.
Choose 1 《KAN-SEN》 character in your waiting room, and return it to your hand.

name: I'm Gonna Claim My Reward!
ability: 【CONT】 All of your characters get +1000 power and +1 soul.
(【GATE】: When this card triggers, you may choose 1 climax in your waiting room, and return it to your hand)
flavor_text: Ying Swei: "I never thought I'd be able to enjoy the company of my sister and all our friends like this…"

name: Brave Eagles, We Fight Until The End!
ability: 【CONT】 All of your characters get +1000 power and +1 soul.
(【GATE】: When this card triggers, you may choose 1 climax in your waiting room, and return it to your hand)
flavor_text: New Jersey: "We owe a lot to you, Miss Heroine."

name: Hybrid Idealization X
ability: 【CONT】 All of your characters get +1000 power and +1 soul.
(【GATE】: When this card triggers, you may choose 1 climax in your waiting room, and return it to your hand)
flavor_text: I've determined that establishing mutual trust between us is beneficial to my battlefield performance.

name: Mid-Autumn Moon
ability: 【CONT】 All of your characters get +1000 power and +1 soul.
(【GATE】: When this card triggers, you may choose 1 climax in your waiting room, and return it to your hand)
flavor_text: The moon and the lights are all bright and pretty...!
